## 🏨 Hotel Recommendation: **Montmartre Suites**
- **Price range:** €110 - €200 per night (under your €210 budget!)
- **Rating:** ⭐ **4.7** — the highest rating among all hotels in Paris!
- **Address:** 23 Rue Lepic, 75018 Paris, France
- **Why:** Stunning views, impeccable cleanliness, and amazing staff!

## 🍽️ Restaurant Recommendation: **Breizh Café**
- **Cuisine:** French (specializing in authentic Breton crêpes)
- **Rating:** ⭐ 3.9
- **Open on Sundays:** ✅ Yes! (9:00 AM - 11:00 PM)
- **Price:** €60 per person
- **Why:** It's the only French cuisine restaurant open on Sunday, and it has great reviews — best crepes in Paris!

---

| Item | Calculation | Cost |

| **Restaurant (3 days × 2 meals × 2 people)** | €60/person × 2 people × 2 meals/day × 3 days | **€720** |
| **Total Minimum** | | **€1,050** |

> *For meals: lunch & dinner for 2 people (4 meals per day) for 3 days at €60/person = €720.*
